title: The Hobbit
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A hobbit named Bilbo Baggins goes on an unexpected adventure with dwarves to reclaim a treasure guarded by a dragon.

title: The Fellowship of the Ring
author: J.R.R. Tolkien
description: A young hobbit and his companions set out on a quest to destroy a powerful ring and save Middle-earth from darkness.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
author: J.K. Rowling
description: A young wizard discovers his magical heritage and attends a school of witchcraft where he battles dark forces.

title: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
author: J.K. Rowling
description: A boy wizard returns to his magical school and must uncover the secret of a monster hidden within its walls.

title: A Game of Thrones
author: George R.R. Martin
description: Noble families battle for control of a fractured kingdom while an ancient threat gathers beyond an icy wall.

title: Dune
author: Frank Herbert
description: A young nobleman leads a rebellion on a desert planet that holds the key to a valuable spice resource.

title: Foundation
author: Isaac Asimov
description: A mathematician predicts the fall of a galactic empire and establishes a foundation to preserve civilization.

title: Ender's Game
author: Orson Scott Card
description: A gifted child is trained at a military school to command humanity's fleet against an alien invasion.

title: The Martian
author: Andy Weir
description: An astronaut is stranded alone on Mars and must use science and ingenuity to survive until rescue.

author: George Orwell
description: A man living under a totalitarian regime begins to question the oppressive surveillance state controlling his life.

title: Brave New World
author: Aldous Huxley
description: A futuristic society engineered for happiness hides a dark cost to individuality and freedom.

title: Fahrenheit 451
author: Ray Bradbury
description: A fireman whose job is to burn books begins to question a society that forbids reading and independent thought.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: A witty young woman navigates love and social expectations in nineteenth century England.

title: Sense and Sensibility
author: Jane Austen
description: Two sisters experience love and heartbreak while dealing with financial hardship in English society.

title: The Fault in Our Stars
author: John Green
description: Two teenagers with cancer fall in love while confronting mortality and the meaning of life.

title: Me Before You
author: Jojo Moyes
description: A young woman becomes a caretaker for a paralyzed man and their bond changes both their lives.

title: Gone Girl
author: Gillian Flynn
description: A man becomes the prime suspect when his wife mysteriously disappears on their wedding anniversary.

title: The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo
author: Stieg Larsson
description: A journalist and a hacker investigate a decades old disappearance tied to a powerful family's dark secrets.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A psychotherapist becomes obsessed with treating a woman who refuses to speak after murdering her husband.

title: Sherlock Holmes: A Study in Scarlet
author: Arthur Conan Doyle
description: A brilliant detective and his companion investigate a mysterious murder in London using keen deduction.

title: Murder on the Orient Express
author: Agatha Christie
description: A detective must solve a murder aboard a snowbound train filled with suspicious passengers.

title: The Da Vinci Code
author: Dan Brown
description: A symbologist unravels a deadly conspiracy hidden within works of art and religious history.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A young girl learns about racial injustice and moral courage in a small southern town.

title: The Great Gatsby
author: F. Scott Fitzgerald
description: A mysterious millionaire's obsession with a lost love unravels amid the excess of the Jazz Age.

title: Moby Dick
author: Herman Melville
description: A sailor recounts the obsessive quest of a captain determined to kill a great white whale.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A young shepherd travels across the desert in search of treasure and discovers the meaning of his personal destiny.

title: Sapiens
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: An exploration of how humankind evolved and shaped civilization through cognitive and social revolutions.

title: Educated
author: Tara Westover
description: A woman raised in a strict survivalist family pursues education and transforms her life against great odds.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones through small consistent changes.

title: The Power of Habit
author: Charles Duhigg
description: An exploration of the science behind habit formation and how it shapes individuals and organizations.
